allow: Bash(node -e "const { SmartAPI } = require\(''smartapi-javascript''\); const s = new SmartAPI\({ api_key: ''test'' }\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(s\)\).sort\(\).join\(''\\n''\)\)")
